description: Fragment of a power of attorney. Location: Ramla. Dated: Monday, 14 Tammuz 4826 AM = 10 July 1066 CE. Written and signed by Eliyyahu Gaʾon, also signed by the physician and ḥaver ʿAmram b. Aharon ha-Kohen (also signed ENA 4007.6; unrelated to his namesake who wrote, e.g., T-S 28.5), and Shelomo b. Ṭoviyyahu ha-Shelishi.
description_he: שבר ייפוי כוח, רמלה, יום שני י"ד תמוז 4826 (10 ביולי 1066). נכתב וחתום בידי אליהו גאון.
